# Vanya Eco Products

Vanya Eco Products is a Kerala based spice and eco products brand from Wayanad, India.

Website:
https://www.vanyaecoproducts.in

Brand Name:
Vanya Eco Products

Brand Line:
Flavours by Vanya

Tagline:
Pure Spices, True Flavours.


About:
Vanya Eco Products is a Wayanad based brand focused on authentic spices, masalas, teas, coffees, coconut oils, nuts, and natural products sourced directly from trusted farmers. Our products are processed in small batches in our own mills to preserve freshness, aroma, flavour, and purity. Unlike mass commercial brands, we avoid artificial preservatives, colours, and excessive processing, ensuring a more natural and honest farm to home experience.

Main Categories:
- Masalas
- Raw Spices
- Teas
- Coffees
- Coconut Oil
- Nuts
- Honey

Popular Products:
- Turmeric Powder
- Chilli Powder
- Kashmiri Chilli Powder
- Raw Pepper
- Pepper Powder
- Cardamom
- Garam Masala
- Cashew
- Wayanad Tea
- Chicken Masala
- Wayanad Coffee
- Masala Coffee
- Pure Virgin Coconut Oil
- Vendha Velichenna
- Malabar Tamarind

Brand Values:
- Direct sourcing
- No preservatives
- No artificial colours
- Small batch processing
- Authentic Kerala flavours
- Farm to home approach

Location:
Wayanad, Kerala, India

Contact:
Phone: +91 79076 62508
Email: business@vanyaecoproducts.in

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/vanya_eco_products

Google Business Profile:
Vanya Eco Products
